zh.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III是Hugh Wardale和Anna Eden的兒子，於1530年1月11日出生在英國林可爾史爾維爾。他於1556年與Isabel Lascelles在英國林可爾史爾阿福德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年11月26日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III是Hugh Wardale和Anna Eden的儿子，于1530年1月11日出生在英国林可爾史爾維爾。他于1556年与Isabel Lascelles在英国林可爾史爾阿福德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年11月26日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Wardale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Wardle
meanings: habitational name from Wardle in Lancashire and possibly Wardle in Cheshire, both named with Old English weard-hyll ‘watch hill’. Compare Warden 2 and Wardlaw .
habitational name from Weardale (Durham), which takes its name from the river Wear (related to the Indo-European root wis-, weis- ‘liquid, flow’ or wedōr- ‘water’) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III was born on 11 January 1530, in Well, Lincolnshire, England as the son of Hugh Wardale and Anna Eden. He married Isabel Lascelles in 1556, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 November 1585, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III est né le 11 janvier 1530, à Well, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, fils de Hugh Wardale et Anna Eden. Il a épousé Isabel Lascelles en 1556, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 novembre 1585, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III wurde am 11. Januar 1530 in Well, Lincolnshire, England, als Sohn von Hugh Wardale und Anna Eden geboren. Er hat 1556 in Alford, Lincolnshire, England Isabel Lascelles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. November 1585 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III è nato il il 11 gennaio 1530 nel Well, Lincolnshire, England come figlio di Hugh Wardale e Anna Eden. Lui sposato Isabel Lascelles nel 1556, nel Alford, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 novembre 1585, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Alford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale IIIは1530年1月11日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエルでHugh WardaleとAnna Edenの息子として生まれた。1556年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードでIsabel Lascellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年11月26日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III(은)는 1530년 1월 11일 영국 링코실르 웰에서 Hugh Wardale(와)과 Anna Eden의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1556년 영국 링코실르 알퍼드에서 Isabel Lascelles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 11월 26일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 알퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.11 January 1530–26 November 1585: 11 de janeiro de 1530–26 de novembro de 1585
pt.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1530, em Well, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra filho de Hugh Wardale e Anna Eden. Ele casou-se com Isabel Lascelles em 1556, em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1585, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III родился 11 января 1530 г. в местности велл, линколншир, Англия. Его родителей звали Hugh Wardale и Anna Eden. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Lascelles в 1556 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 ноября 1585 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.11 January 1530–26 November 1585: 11 de enero de 1530–26 de noviembre de 1585
es.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Wardale III nació el 11 de enero de 1530, en Well, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Hugh Wardale y Anna Eden. Se casó con Isabel Lascelles en 1556, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1585, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
